series_metadata.series_description: These correspondence include Self-insured letters, Self-insured employee Evaluation Board letters and memorandums of legal opinions, Self-insured complaint responses for executive signatures.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: last payment of medical or 10 years payment of compensation, addditional 2 years ; Paper: Send location of Self-insure file in SI section, last payment of medical or 10 years payment of compensation, addditional 2 years
